rev_share.description: for CPA payout model, this is PERCENT of revenue to publisher

color_enabled.description: ColorEnabled allows to enable/disable row highlighting according to column. Only one column can have true value.

enabled.description: Show column in a table or not

id.description: Column id - field name in storage

is_custom_column.description: IsCustom == true if column is custom

name.description: Name contains user's name of column

variable_ids.description: VariableIDs contains unique column ids that uses in formula

default_payout_type.description: DefaultPayoutType is a way how payout will be calculated by default

default_payout_value.description: DefaultPayoutValue is a value of payout

event_name.description: EventName is a default event name for conversions

matching.description: Matching - set of type pairs RedTrack->Facebook

conversion_type.description: ConversionType is type of conversion in Redtrack: default, type1, type20

facebook_type.description: FacebookType is type of conversion in Facebook: Purchase, AddToCart, etc.

payout_condition.description: PayoutCondition is a condition when this matching should be applied

payout_type.description: PayoutType is a way how payout will be calculated

payout_value.description: PayoutValue is a value of payout

action_source_fb.description: ActionSourceFB is a place where a conversion occurred (e.g. mail, website, etc.)

conversions_apikey.description: ConversionsApikey is an access token to the pixel

event_source_url_fb.description: EventSourceUrlFB is a browser URL where a conversion happened

emails.description: Emails is list of emails for sending payout request notifications

is_email.description: IsEmail is true if we should send payout request to user email

is_webhook.description: IsWebhook is true if we should send payout request to webhook

webhook_url.description: WebhookURL is client's url for getting payout request (only POST method)

company_name.description: CompanyName is organization name, will also be used in invoice description

details.description: Details are billing and/ contact details

payment_notifications.description: PaymentNotifications defines how to send notifications about payout request

payment_terms.description: PaymentTerms are "Net" payment terms for invoice

payment_types.description: PaymentTypes contains list of payment types (wire transfer, paypal, etc.)

amount.description: Amount is minimum allowed amount of request payout

is_enabled.description: IsEnabled is true if we should display the payment type in publisher interface

integration_alias.description: IntegrationAlias stores integration name. Based on this name, select integration data from field

conversions_settings.description: ConversionsSettings stores the rules for displaying columns in the conversions log in a pub panel

gtm_id.description: GtmID is account for Google Tag Manager id

manager_email.description: ManagerEmail is contact information of publishers manager email.

referral_program.description:
ReferralProgram is set of options, associated to publishers referral program. If this value set to nil,
or Enabled field is false, than referral program is disabled

settings.description: Settings stores the rules for displaying columns in reports in a pub panel

show_accrued_conversions.description: if true we have to consider campaigns condition postbacks in filters

find_us.description: How did you hear about us?

invited_by.description: InvitedBy points to referral inviter. Could be empty.

manager_email.description: ManagerEmail is contact information of publisher's manager email. See RTK-421 for more info

messenger.description: Messenger is account name in a messenger

messenger_type.description: MessengerType is type of messenger (facebook, skype, telegram, phone, other)

parents.description:
Parents array of Ids of all referral parents. Referral program: A -> B -> C.
For publisher C field 'parents' will contain id of publisher A and id of publisher B

payment_type.description:
PaymentType is a preferred payment type for this publisher. This field can contain any value of payment
identificator for specific pubSettings (publisher whitelabel). Typically, if PaymentType contains
invalid identificator (/^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]$/) or it doesn't contain in pubSettings payment methods, then
any action with payout must throw error

payout_types.description: What payout types do you work with

payout_volume.description: What is your monthly volume for your offers

referral.description: Were you referred by our AM or another publisher?

referral_program.description:
ReferralProgram is set of options, associated to publishers referral program. If this value set to nil,
or Enabled field is false, than referral program is disabled

referral_program_approved.description:
ReferralProgramApproved
аппрув паблишеру в реф программе, означает,
что пригласивший паблишер и все паблишеры выше по иерархии будут получать выплаты по
реф программе за действия аппрувнотого паблишера.
Если аппрува нет, то выплаты будут засчитываться, но не учитываться.

CommissionExpirationDate - after the date, the publishers won't get
commission for conversions if CommissionExpirationEnabled == true

commission_expiration_enabled.description: CommissionExpirationEnabled - if true, the publishers will get commission only before CommissionExpirationDate

enabled.description: Enabled indicates that referral program is enabled for specific PubSetting/whitelabel

maximumReferralsChain.description:
MaximumReferralsChain is maximum count of users which are participated in referral program. For
setting, use it native (like MaximumReferralsChain = <your value>), but for getting, use GetMaxSteps()
method, cause this field may contain invalid values.
0 is invalid, default value is 1. If set to -1, payments will make biggest chain ever possible, and
will pay to sediment

Default value is 9. If value is -1, then it must be interpreted as maximum possible chain. If it is
zero, then referral chain must be interpreted as 1

paymentsFirstMultiplier.description:
PaymentsFirstMultiplier is base multiplier for the first referral emitent after publisher who received.

Default value is 0.1

referralURL.description: ReferralURL is custom url for referral program signup link

stepDecrementCoefficient.description:
StepDecrementCoefficient is a field that denotes the number to which the main factor of the first step
is reduced.

Default value is 0.01
